steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The underlined phrase is a simile used to describe the physical appearance of the columns at the ruins.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: The simile functions to illustrate what the columns look like by presenting a visual image. Choice B correctly identifies this: “It presents an image to illustrate what one part of the ruins looks like.” The other three misidentify the phrase's purpose, attributing it to hopes the narrator doesn't express, historical information the passage doesn't provide, or evidence of scholarship it doesn't demonstrate. That matches choice B — B is correct.
